case_title: INDEPENDENT RECEIVABLES CORPORATION VS. FRANK HANNAH

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF CHANGE OF FIRM NAME FILED BY ATTORNEY SLINSKY, LOURDES

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF INDEPENDENT RECEIVABLES CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT HANNAH, FRANK SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-26-2008

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF INDEPENDENT RECEIVABLES CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HANNAH, FRANK $7,556.00 PRINCIPAL, $736.97 INTEREST, $250.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,542.97, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
